modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Excel zooms to 200% when opening a spreadsheet in Smart Classroom.

full_description_text: I am having a problem with Excel in the Smart Classroom. Every time I open a document, the screen zooms in really close. Also, when I type in a cell, it zooms in even more. This makes it hard to see everything on the screen.
short_description: Excel zooms to 200% when opening a spreadsheet in Smart Classroom.
description: I am having a problem with Excel in the Smart Classroom. Every time I open a document, the screen zooms in really close. Also, when I type in a cell, it zooms in even more. This makes it hard to see everything on the screen.
